title: Timeline Overlapnotification
excerpt:
Greetings, 
i have a very specific question. My Goal was to get a notification when i add a new Element to my Timeline. Also i want it to notify me when two Projects overlap.

posts.author: Urs (Urs Eberle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings,

i have a very specific question. My Goal was to get a notification when i add a new Element to my Timeline. Also i want it to notify me when two Projects overlap.
How can i do it with your help?.
I would appreciate help as it would be very usefull for me.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Urs ,

Welcome to the monday community!

While this is not currently possible as you are describing it, I would suggest looking into and trying out the Timeline Widget.

You can learn more regarding that here : https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360017206280-The-Timeline-View-and-Widget

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
